title: Better Copper Gear
description: A Texture Pack that Remakes The New Copper Items!
body:
![Copper Gear Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41197faa0dfe0fb0de67aa19be624cf62f2d9da9.png)

A Simple Texture Pack that remakes the **New Copper Items** to make them more interesting!

# _New Tools!_ # 
The **Tools** have a more unique design, to make them more desirable!

![Copper Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79ead818d06cb49753f0632ddfc91f940e8d72dc.png)

# _New Armor!_ #
The **Armor** now shares some features with the **New Copper Golem** Mob:

![Copper Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a35009fe7bf3f38148896f07940d370d7c66789d.png)
